name: 6' Flocked Mixed Greenery with Pinecones Artificial Christmas Garland - Wondershop™: Unlit, Indoor/Outdoor Use
description:
Fill your home with the greenery of the season without the upkeep with this 6-Foot Flocked Mixed Greenery with Pinecones Artificial Christmas Garland from Wondershop™. This artificial decorative garland is designed with faux mixed pine tips and pinecones for an authentic, snowy look. Best of all, this unlit garland features a loop at each end for easy hanging.

Welcome to the Wondershop™.
